title: AAYS 113 DEM broad inventory fresh 1910
scope: Broad read-only inventory for DEM/DTM/elevation raster files after AAYS 112 completed with blocker No DEM/DTM raster found under E:\AAYS_DATA. Search E:\AAYS_DATA, E:\, and AAYS repo for .tif/.tiff/.asc/.vrt/.img. No DB writes. No production deploy. No fake elevation values.
wait_minutes_after_start: 10-30; allow 30-40 if E drive scan is large
self_correction_rules: If one root is inaccessible, continue with remaining roots.
If scan is slow, rely on timeout and partial CSV if produced.
Classify raster candidates by filename keyword score.
